overall.description: First-person underwater exploration gameplay from a diving perspective, swimming through dark bioluminescent waters with an orange diving suit. The player navigates deep ocean environments featuring glowing flora, rocky formations, and sandy seabeds while equipped with a handheld propulsion tool.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep underwater cavern with bioluminescent elements

events.description: large purple glowing orb becomes visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: swimming steadily through deep dark water, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: large spherical glowing purple object floating in the distance
dark rock formation visible through the murky water
orange diving suit arms visible at bottom of frame
small glowing specks floating in the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a diving suit, swimming through deep dark waters. A large purple luminous orb is visible in the distance to the left, while rocky walls emerge from the darkness. Bioluminescent particles drift through the water, providing sparse illumination in the otherwise pitch-black environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open deep water with bioluminescent flora

events.description: player equips propulsion cannon tool in right hand

agents.ego_description: swimming through open water while holding a propulsion cannon, scanning for resources

entered.detail: black handheld tool with glowing blue ring interface
clusters of glowing blue-green underwater plants

segments.scene_description: The player continues swimming through open deep water, now equipped with a propulsion cannon tool visible in the foreground. The environment features scattered bioluminescent flora and seaweed clusters that emit a soft blue-green glow. The rocky walls and purple orb from the previous segment are no longer visible as the player moves into more open water.

scene_state.functional_zone: seabed with rocky outcrops and sand

events.description: seabed becomes visible as player descends to the ocean floor

agents.ego_description: descending to the seabed and swimming close to the sandy bottom, examining rock formations

entered.detail: pale sand covering the ocean floor illuminated by suit lights
large dark rock outcrop rising from the seabed
scattered rocks and boulders on the sandy bottom

segments.scene_description: The player descends to the seabed where sandy terrain and rock formations become visible in the limited light. The bioluminescent flora from the open water segment fades from view as the environment becomes dominated by the dark seabed floor. The propulsion cannon remains equipped as the player explores the rocky bottom area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person descent from the dark, open depths of a bioluminescent ocean down to a rocky seabed. It begins by swimming through pitch-black waters where a large purple luminous orb and rocky walls are faintly visible amidst drifting glowing particles. As the camera moves further into the open water, the purple orb vanishes and is replaced by clusters of soft blue-green bioluminescent flora and seaweed, with a propulsion cannon now appearing in the foreground. The scene then shifts as the player descends, causing the glowing flora to fade away while the environment transitions into a dark, sandy floor. Finally, the camera settles along the seabed, navigating through rugged rock formations in the limited light.
